itemMovement.descClient:: Smooths item movement on the client during server or network lag. Default:true
itemMovement.descServer: Compensates item movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla behaviour. Default: true

entityMovement.descClient:: Smooths living entity movement on the client during server or network lag. Default: true
entityMovement.descServer: Compensates living entity movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla behavior. Default: true

minecartMovement.descClient:: Smooths minecart movement on the client during server or network lag. Default: true
minecartMovement.descServer: Compensates minecart movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla physics behavior. Default: true

experienceOrbMovement.descServer: Compensates experience orb movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla collection behavior. Default: true

fallingblockmovement.descServer: Compensates falling block movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla physics behavior. Default: true

projectileMovement.descServer: Compensates projectile movement on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla travel distance and timing. Default: true

playerMovement.descServer: Compensates player movement calculations during low TPS to reduce rubber-banding issues on the client. default:true

skyMovement.descClient:: Smooths sky/day movement on the client during server or network lag. Default: true
skyMovement.descServer: Compensates daytime progression on the server during low TPS to preserve vanilla day length. Default: true
